from __future__ import annotations

import time
import tracemalloc


def python_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_benchmark_allocations_not_tracked_negative(work):
    tracemalloc.start()
    start = time.perf_counter()
    work()
    duration = time.perf_counter() - start
    _, peak = tracemalloc.get_traced_memory()
    tracemalloc.stop()
    return duration, peak
